weekly picks (Mar 4 week 2026)

Posted on March 23, 2026 in 2026mar,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 4th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

03/23

  1. s41467-026-70324-3 Metal-organic framework-confined Co3O4 for humidity-immune ozone decomposition (Nature Communications)

  2. s41467-026-70711-w High-κ KBe2BO3F2 dielectric material with wide bandgap for two-dimensional electronics (Nature Communications)

  3. 2603.19351v1 Crossover and Critical Behavior in the Layered XY Model (arXiv)

  4. 2603.19366v1 Deciphering Molecular Charge Anisotropy: the Case of Antibody Solutions (arXiv)

  5. 2603.19378v1 Tailoring Corner States and Exceptional Points in Altermagnets (arXiv)

  6. 2603.19381v1 Matrix Product States for Modulated Topological Phases: Crystalline Equivalence Principle and Lieb-Schultz-Mattis Constraints (arXiv)

  7. 2603.19404v1 Programmable, Spontaneous Superlattice Memory in a Monolayer Topological Insulator (arXiv)

  8. 2603.19408v1 Dynamic scaling near the Kasteleyn transition in spin ice: critical relaxation of monopoles and strings following a field quench (arXiv)

  9. 2603.19411v1 Level 2.5 large deviations and uncertainty relations for self-interacting jump processes: tilting constructions and the emergence of time-scale separation (arXiv)

  10. 2603.19433v1 Tailoring Emergent Magnetic Moment in La${0.7}$Sr${0.3}$MnO$_3$-Bi$_2$Te$_3$ Heterostructures via Interfacial Reconstructions (arXiv)

  13. 2603.19438v1 Ultrastrong Coupling and Coherent Dynamics in a Gate-Tunable Transmon Qubit (arXiv)

  16. 2603.19513v1 Quantum transfer in high-root topological insulators (arXiv)

  17. 2603.19592v1 Non-collinear ferromagnetism in the Kondo lattice Ce$_5$CoGe$_2$ (arXiv)

  18. 2603.19603v1 The effect of interactions on elastic cavitation (arXiv)

  19. 2603.19619v1 Realizing giant valley polarization effect based on monolayer altermagnets (arXiv)

  26. 2603.19719v1 Effects of Divalent Cations on Diffusion Dynamics of Biological Water Confined between Lipid Membranes (arXiv)

  28. 2603.19743v1 Spin subdiffusion in perturbed infinite-U Hubbard chain (arXiv)

  32. 2603.19850v1 Starvation suppression in scale-free metabolic networks: Dynamical mean-field analysis of dense catalytic reaction networks (arXiv)
